title: Starbase Capacity And Outposts
text: Ordinary outposts should be tracked separately from upgraded starbases when reasoning about starbase capacity. Capacity pressure should be judged from upgraded starbase usage, not from the total number of outpost-level systems.

title: Player Visible Advice Boundary
text: In player_visible mode, advice should use only information the player can normally know: parsed player empire facts, visible diplomacy, first contacts, visible hostile intel, known systems, and visible hyperlane distances. Hidden AI empire details and undiscovered systems should not be introduced.

title: Machine Servitor Early Economy
text: For a Rogue Servitor or machine servitor economy, keep basic machine growth and bio-trophy support in view while expanding research and alloy output. Recommendations should account for available buildings, colony designations, amenities, housing, and whether the parser has enough job detail.

title: Visible Hostile Target Types
text: Visible hostile entries should not all be treated as active invasion fleets. Static hostile starbases, mining stations, and platforms are different from mobile military fleets. Civilian ships may indicate an opposing owner but are not direct combat pressure by themselves. Space fauna can be dangerous, but movement and aggression should be validated by mechanics evidence and current map paths before recommending fleet construction.
